task_completion.description: Merge tables to map households to zones and categorize household sizes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code cells showing merge/join operations between households, buildings, and parcels tables to obtain 'zone_id'. Code should also show logic categorizing the 'persons' column into '1-person', '2-person', and '3+ person' brackets.

task_completion.description: Group by zone, filter by minimum households, and calculate required metrics.

task_completion.description: Identify the top 5 zones for 1-person and top 5 zones for 3+ person households.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing sorting or nlargest/head operations to extract the 5 zones with the highest percentage of 1-person households and the 5 zones with the highest percentage of 3+ person households.

task_completion.description: Export the aggregated zone data to a CSV file.

task_completion.description: Generate and save a bar chart comparing the 10 identified zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bar chart visible in the notebook output comparing household size distributions for the 10 selected zones, and code saving the figure to '/home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/family_vs_single_zones.png'.
